sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, description TEXT, flags BITSTRING);
SELECT id, description, contains(description, 'a') AS contains_a, flags & '10000'::BITSTRING AS flag_check FROM test_data WHERE flags & '10001'::BITSTRING <> '00000'::BITSTRING;
SELECT id, description FROM test_data WHERE contains(description, 'd') AND flags & '10101'::BITSTRING = '10101'::BITSTRING;
CREATE TABLE more_data (user_id INT, preference TEXT);

SELECT t1.id, t1.description, COUNT(t2.user_id) AS user_count FROM test_data t1 LEFT JOIN more_data t2 ON contains(t1.description, t2.preference) GROUP BY t1.id, t1.description HAVING flags & '10000'::BITSTRING IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, description, flags FROM test_data WHERE flags IS NOT NULL AND contains(description, 'xyz') AND (flags & '11111'::BITSTRING) <> '00000'::BITSTRING;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM more_data WHERE preference IS NOT NULL AND contains(preference, 'def'));
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, flags FROM test_data;
SELECT t.id, (flags & '10101'::BITSTRING) AS flag_result FROM temp_data t WHERE contains(CAST(flag_result AS TEXT), '101') OR flags IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, description, flags & '11111'::BITSTRING AS combined_flags FROM test_data) AS subquery WHERE contains(description, 'e') AND combined_flags > '00000'::BITSTRING;
